title: WiscKey: Separating Keys from Values in SSD-Conscious Storage
why: 键值分离的代表作，LSM/SSD 方向绕不过去。

title: Monkey: Optimal Navigable Key-Value Store
why: LSM 读放大与布隆过滤器分配的经典工作。

title: PebblesDB: Building Key-Value Stores using Fragmented Log-Structured Merge Trees
why: LSM 结构改造的代表作，适合和 WiscKey 对照着看。

title: Titan: A High-Performance Remote-Swap System
why: FAST 味很正，系统与存储交叉。

title: Design Tradeoffs for SSD Performance
why: SSD 设计空间的老经典。

title: Learned Cache Replacement for Datacenter Storage Systems
why: 系统味较强，数据中心存储方向。

title: The Tail at Scale
why: 系统性能分析与延迟思维的必读经典。

title: A Case for Tiny Tasks in Compute Clusters
why: 系统基础设施调度思路的经典小文。

title: Optimizing Datacenter Performance via CXL-Aware Memory Tiering
why: 偏你感兴趣的内存/架构/CXL 路线。

title: BetrFS: A Right-Optimized Write-Optimized File System
why: 写优化文件系统的代表性工作。

title: SILK: Preventing Latency Spikes in Log-Structured Merge Key-Value Stores
why: LSM 延迟毛刺问题，非常贴近工程痛点。

title: LOCATOR: A Key-Value Store for Hybrid-Cloud Workloads
why: 更现代的存储系统视角。

title: Tpp: Transparent Page Placement for CXL-Enabled Tiered-Memory
why: CXL 分层内存方向，挺对你胃口。

title: RowClone: Fast and Energy-Efficient In-DRAM Bulk Data Copy and Initialization
why: 内存系统经典，适合和现代 memory tiering 一起看。

title: SoftMC: A Flexible and Practical Open-Source Infrastructure for Enabling Experimental DRAM Studies
why: 偏架构实验基础设施，味道很正。
